name: 報い-Retribution
short_description: In the 1980s, a young man is driving home when trouble occurs. The young man, who is familiar with the area, goes to a nearby inn to ask for help, but a bizarre experience strikes him. Can the young man make it home safely?
detailed_description:
Synopsis

In the 1980s, a young man is driving home when trouble occurs.

The young man, who is familiar with the area, goes to a nearby inn to ask for help, but a bizarre experience strikes him.

Can the young man make it home safely?

Game Summary

Title Retribution

Genre Horror Adventure

Play time About 1 to 2 hours

Ending branching is available.

Recommended for ages 15 and up.(Contains violent expressions)

Recommended: 15 years old or older ・Required to wear headphones due to the 3D sound.

Guidelines

For this game, regarding video, live streaming, and image posting

All scenes in the game can be posted.

*Postings to sites that are offensive to public order and morals or that give a false impression of the game content are prohibited.
